use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct UserRequest {
    name: String,
    email: String,
    role: String,
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct RequestBody {
    user: UserRequest,
}

#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]
struct UserResponse<'a> {
    name: &'a str,
    email: &'a str,
    role: &'a str,
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct DatabaseConfig {
    host: String,
    port: u16,
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Config {
    database: DatabaseConfig,
}

fn process_request(body: &[u8]) -> Result<String, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data: RequestBody = serde_json::from_slice(body)?;
    let response = UserResponse {
        name: &data.user.name,
        email: &data.user.email,
        role: &data.user.role,
    };
    Ok(serde_json::to_string(&response)?)
}

fn extract_nested_field(config: &Config) -> &str {
    &config.database.host
}
